description: Autotest configuration for bundler-multiple-sources P1 probe — validates multiple source blocks in Gemfile. 4 direct deps, ~9 total.

base_config._comment_validate_scan_output: Whether to validate the scan output/exit code. Options: true | false. Default: true

scan_output._comment_security_scan_report_conclusion: Optional. Expected scan report conclusion. Options: 'success' | 'failure'.
scan_output._comment_expected_messages: Optional. List of messages to validate in security check output/summary with severity levels.

base_config._comment_validate_dependency_tree: Whether to validate the dependency tree.

dependency_tree._comment_check_dependency_tree_detection: Whether to check if dependency tree was successfully detected.
dependency_tree._comment_expected_dependencies_number: Optional. Operators: gt, gte, lt, lte, eq.
dependency_tree._comment_dependencies_names_list: Optional. Operators: eq, contains, in, nin.

base_config._comment_validate_vulnerabilities_table: Whether to validate the vulnerabilities table.
